name: Team Plasma Grunt
description:
You know what? It took surprisingly long to find an illustration of the Team Plasma Grunt, and in the end I had to use some SFW artwork whose artist I couldn't even track down... If anyone can suggest a more suitable and less SFW image, that would be great. The situation is quite similar to the Team Galactic Grunt: you beat her in a battle, she doesn't have the money to pay you, you know the drill, the joke is that this girl SERIOUSLY thinks she's fighting to free the Pokémon, and she's quite firm about it; she's not evil, just a bit blind and clueless, she could use a little eye-opening.

And before i forget: happy new year, since I'll probably not be here that day
creator: HyperN
